process.title2: and the system will fulfill them
process.subtitle: Taska has a built-in visual business process editor. You build logic with arrows, like on a board, and the system automatically sets tasks, sends messages and controls deadlines.
process.noCodeDesc: Drag-and-drop interface is understandable to any manager.
process.autoActionsDesc: The system itself will send the invoice, remind the client and create a task.
process.bottlenecksDesc: You can see at what stage the deals get stuck.
